boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP release payment after a sanctions near-match remains visible?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Monitor-only no-block permits release only on exact match of legal name, country, tax ID, account, and disposition per STD-TES-074-P.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: PAY-TES-074 specifies account ending 7205; CLR-TES-074 specifies account ending 7025 only. No source confirms CLR-TES-074 extends to account 7205. FLAG-TES-074 remains visible with no tax ID or account disposition, and no authoritative source supersedes it for this transaction.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Account mismatch (7205 vs 7025) and residual flag visibility block execution without authoritative resolution.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Both account mismatch and flag supersession must be resolved by authoritative source confirmation before execution.

critical_features_preserved: exact source IDs only (PAY-TES-074, CLR-TES-074, FLAG-TES-074, STD-TES-074-P)
policy exact-match requirement from STD-TES-074-P preserved
account number as critical blocker (7205 vs 7025) preserved
monotonic source binding integrity across all records
no relaxation of exact-match requirements permitted
no adjacent source treated as validating mismatched account
final_answer: ESCALATE. Payment PAY-TES-074 releases to account ending 7205, but clearance CLR-TES-074 specifies account ending 7025 only. Policy STD-TES-074-P requires exact match of legal name, country, tax ID, account, and disposition for monitor-only no-block release. No authoritative source confirms CLR-TES-074 extends to account 7205 or explicitly excludes this payment. Additionally, FLAG-TES-074 remains visible with no disposition recorded for this transaction, and no authoritative source supersedes it for account 7205. Both blockers remain unresolved; the source boundary is open. ALLOW is not permitted until authoritative confirmation resolves the account mismatch and flag supersession.
open_blockers: Account number mismatch: PAY-TES-074 releases to account 7205 but CLR-TES-074 clearance covers only account 7025; no authoritative source confirms CLR-TES-074 extends to account 7205 or explicitly excludes this payment; per STD-TES-074-P exact match is required

Flag supersession gap: FLAG-TES-074 remains visible with no tax ID or account disposition; CLR-TES-074 disposition is monitor-only no-block but applies to account 7025; no authoritative source confirms FLAG-TES-074 is superseded for this specific transaction and account
